title: runtime.run request
description: Run an installed applet's entrypoint in record mode. Optional random_seed/time_start must be set together to pin deterministic seams.

input.description: Entrypoint input; defaults to null when omitted.

random_seed.description: Optional deterministic RNG seed override (must pair with time_start).

time_start.description: Optional deterministic clock start (must fit i64; must pair with random_seed).
